title: Senior AI Product Manager
description: Lead AI product strategy for enterprise copilots across APAC. Partner with design, engineering, and GTM teams to ship LLM-powered workflows.
requirements: 5+ years in product management, strong AI or ML product experience, enterprise SaaS background, excellent stakeholder management.

title: Entry Level Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build data pipelines, train baseline models, and support ML experimentation for financial risk products.
requirements: Python, SQL, statistics fundamentals, internships or projects in machine learning.

title: Remote Fintech Product Manager
description: Own roadmap for payments, compliance, and embedded finance APIs for startups and platforms.
requirements: Product management experience, fintech domain knowledge, API products, customer discovery, analytics.

title: Blockchain AI Product Lead
description: Design AI agents for on-chain analytics, wallet intelligence, and automated compliance workflows.
requirements: Blockchain experience, AI product strategy, B2B SaaS leadership, comfort with ambiguous zero-to-one products.

title: Data Scientist, Growth
description: Model marketplace liquidity, optimize search ranking, and improve candidate-job matching funnels.
requirements: Python, experimentation, causal inference, ranking systems, strong communication.

title: RAG Solutions Architect
description: Help enterprise customers build retrieval augmented generation systems with vector search and LLM orchestration.
requirements: RAG, embeddings, Python, cloud architecture, customer-facing technical leadership.
